ddt:Target.Name: PHEV_base_eq_V1.0
ddt:Target.Description:
Application : N/A Motorisation : PHEV ECU: 5M4A C1A_HR16Deg3h_PHEV_HEV_xJA_B_I_L_xFBph2_20201119_20201204T100643 ____________________________________
[06-01-2021] Essence_base_eq_V1.0 (CTL - Carlos REYES) -Data.Read type variables deleted -Screens deleted
Base created in order to simplify measurements in COP Centers. This base contains the most important variables based on actual specifications (Cahiers des Charges). --------------------------------------
Past updates :
[29-01-2020] Ramya Karthikeyan SaS screen updated for DID $1732
[31-01-2020] Minjae Baek OBFCM Screen added SW65 Auto-ID added
[13-02-2020] Minjae Baek FFD 1406 data unsigned
[06-03-2020] Ishita Kumar $67 Auto Identification Removed
[26-03-2020] Ishita KUMAR DID 3442 to 344F - newly added, DTCs updated
[30-03-2020]Ishita KUMAR $74,$84 Vdiag added, DID 3423-3431, DID $3482,$3560-$356C updated
[10-04-2020]Ishita Kumar Test Homologation- COP OBD screen updated
[17-04-2020]Ishita KUMAR Request_$0917_Total Fuel Consumed (Lifetime), (Recent) unit updated
[07-05-2020]Ishita KUMAR Auto-Identification - supplier 9FP replaced by 9E4
[24-06-2020]Ishita KUMAR DTC P11C1, P025D removed $22 - 116F,1170,2080,2081,345B,345C,DFF0,EC01,EC12,EC30,ECDF,ECF1,ED01,EDDF,EE02,EE03,EEDF added $2E - 345B, 345C, F1A2 added
[21-07-2020]Ishita KUMAR IUPR Screen updated GPF Screen - Write Request added to buttons
[04-09-2020]Ishita KUMAR DTCs Description updated, $2217xx updated
[13-10-2020]Ishita KUMAR DTC P1425 deleted
[09-11-2020]Ishita KUMAR $01 PID updated, $22F011 changed to HEXA
[19-11-2020]Ishita KUMAR $01.PID -02,08,09,0A,12,14,16,17,18,19,1A,1B,1D,1E,22,23,25,26,27,28,29,2A,2B,32,34,35,36,37,38,39,3A,3B,3D,3E,3F,4D,4E,52,59,64,66,6B,6D,6F,70,71,72,74,75,79,7B,94 deleted as per PFE - Simon JACQMART's request Auto Ident - $84 Diag -> version 6800 updated

Data.Name: SessionName
Data.Comment: Diagnostic session values. See documentation for more information.
Data.Description:
[0x00] : ISO / SAE Reserved
[0x01] : Default session
[0x02] : Programming session
[0x03] : Extended diagnostic session
[0x04] : Safety system diagnostic session
[0x05 - 0x3F] : ISO / SAE Reserved
[0x40 - 0x5F] : Vehicle manufacturer specific
[0x60 - 0x7E] : System supplier specific
[0x7F] : ISO / SAE Reserved

Label.Text: Step 1: Select session as "Extended Diagnostic Session" then push the button
Step 4: If you want to stop, select item to stop then push the button.
You have to consider the input value in 1 byte of HEX format for each case
Step 2: Select item to control, "ShortTermAdjustment", "Control start", write input value, and then push the button
Step 3: You can check the status of control
For IOCP : If you want to start control, "Short term adjustment", If you want to stop control, "RenturnControlToECU"
When you click the button : Start when IOCP is start, Stop when ICOP is stop

When you click the button : Start when IOCP is start, Stop when ICOP is stop

Step 1: Before starting Quick TAS Learning, following conditions shall be met.
RPM should be in range : Target RPM +- 200 RPM
*Note : Be sure to Turn off : A/C, Head lamp, Radio, Navigation, Rear defogger, other electric load impact items.
( x : "Complete" if TAS learning done sucessfully )
Push Start button, and go to Step 4, status check
Step 3: Learning Status check : Wait. Learning takes around 20 - 60s
( x : ON - Gear Position in N or P)
This value will be updated if TAS learned OK
Step 1 : Select session as "Extended Diagnostic Session" then push the button.
Step 2 : Select item to control, it' type then push the button.
Parameters linked to the switching in stop auto
DID $1732 must be equal to 0 so that there is no inhibition for SAS
DID $1732 must be equal to 0 so that there is no inhibition for SAS
Voir description dans l'ecran " Verrou Logiciel"
